config firewall policy
Unknown action 0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # show
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "UbuntuComputer-outbound-filter"
        set uuid 3b8a2ff2-29ce-51f1-447f-a8a188d75905
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # show
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "UbuntuComputer-outbound-filter"
        set uuid 3b8a2ff2-29ce-51f1-447f-a8a188d75905
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
